ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Mar-15-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Response To Document Request; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Susan F. Reyes, Esq., Rogelio Lopez, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Peter K. Wolff, Jr., for Fidelity National Title Insurance, Defendant/Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Rogelio Lopez's Motion To Compel Further Response To Document Request is denied. The opposition correctly points out that any motion to compel the further production of documents at deposition must be brought pursuant to C.C.P. Section 2025.450. The only objection that is required in advance of the deposition is any assertion of error or irregularity under Article 2. The objections served on August 9, 2006 were not responses to the Notice of Deposition.
The court finds that the motion was not brought with substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff and his counsel in the amount of $900, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
